taco-pie.name: Taco Pie
instructions: Combine crust ingredients except water in food processor bowl.
Pulse until the mixture creates coarse crumbles. Add water, one tablespoon at a time, until the dough forms a ball.
Roll out dough on a lightly floured surface. Place into 9-inch (22cm) pie plate, and trim the sides.
Bake at 204°C/204°C for 10-15 minutes or until crust is golden brown.
Cook onions and beef in a medium skillet until beef is browned and cooked through. Drain if watery.
Return beef to skillet, add salsa, and taco seasoning. Cook until bubbly.
Pour into baked crust. Top with refried beans, and cheese.
Bake 3 minutes or until cheese is melted.
Let cool. Top with lettuce, tomatoes, sour cream and more cheese!
Enjoy!

tacos-al-pastor-recipe-comedera.name: Tacos Al Pastor Recipe

ingredients.item: 150 ml de jugo de naranja (que sea natural, y mejor si es de naranja agria.)
80 ml vinegar: (preferably a soft as cane, apple or diluted wine))
1  cebolla (si es muy grande, utilizar solo la mitad)
1 cucharadita de pimienta blanca o negra
7 small and hot and non-hot red chilies as per their taste.
Corn tortillas (the quantity to be used depends on how much pilling you will put into each taco.)
Salsa para tacos (al gusto. puede ser verde o roja, picante o no picante.)
1 / 2 kg pork's back (you can also have a leg or head)
1  plato de limones partidos por la mitad

instructions: To cut the pig into small strips or thin sheets (they do not have to cover the width of the piece. Ideally they are small).
Abrir con un cuchillo los chiles para retirar las semillas y la vena.
Sumergir los chiles en agua caliente, por varios minutos, para que se ablanden.
Wash onion, peel and cut into pieces. Also peeling garlic.
Licuar todos los ingredientes de la marinada.
To have the marinade and pieces of meat put into a container. Add some water if you have to have some water to remove each piece. Let them rest in the refrigerator for a few hours, ideally.
Before you re-cook the meat, wash the cilantro and mingle into small pieces.
Peel onion and pineapple as well. Fold first into small cubes and second into small slice.

The cooking of the meat is traditionally made with a topus but for home purposes, it can be made with an oven or with an iron. I prefer the plate. What we have to do is heat her up with high heat for a quick cooking, so you don't lose much juice.

To place the seawold pieces on the plate, trying to avoid overlap. Watch why the color will change in very little time because of fast cooking. Depending on the size of the plate will be the quantity of meat arranged simultaneously. Several cooking may have to be performed.
Mover los trozos para que se cocinen de ambos lados, sin dejar de vigilar.

Sacar la carne de la plancha y reservar. Luego bajar el fuego y colocar luego las tortillas en la plancha, para que se calienten y suavicen con la grasa de la carne. Dejarlas solo lo suficiente para calentarse, sin que se endurezcan. Voltear para calentar los dos lados.
After you get every omelette out of the heat, put it onto a plate, completely open. According to the usual size of Mexican corn tortillas, a plate normally holds five.
distribute meat above tortillas. The idea is to stay so that every omelette can be taken with its ends between his index finger and his thumb, and with his padded inside.
Fold some onion and cilantro onto the flesh. Add small pineapple cuts.
Serve with lemons and salsa (hot or hot). The lemons are used to have each person squeal a piece about his tacos. Lemon is widely used as a condiment in Mexican cuisine.

tagliatelle-pasta-recipe-with-porcini-mu.name: Tagliatelle Pasta Recipe With Porcini Mushrooms
tagliatelle-pasta-recipe-with-porcini-mu.original_name: Receta de pasta tagliatelle con setas porcini

ingredients.item: 150 g de setas porcini frescas o rehidratadas (puedes usar otras setas si no consigues)
Sal y pimienta negra al gusto

instructions: If you wear dry mushrooms, rehydrate them in hot water for 20 minutes, scrape them and order them. If they are fresh, clear them and cut them into sheets.
Cooking the tagliatelle with salt water till they get to the dente. Drain but save half a cup of cooking water.
In a frying pan, melt the butter and purify the garlic for a few seconds. Add mushrooms and cook them till they release their scent and are golden.
Agrega la crema de leche, una pizca de sal, pimienta y el parmesano. Cocina a fuego suave 3 a 4 minutos, removiendo.
It incorporates the dough into the sauce. If it's too thick, add some of the cooking water you booked. Mix well so that everything will be creamed and tied.
Serve hot with chopped parsley and more parmesan if you wish.

tagliolini-with-minced-beef-and-mushroom.name: Tagliolini With Minced Beef And Mushrooms
tagliolini-with-minced-beef-and-mushroom.original_name: Ταλιολίνι με ψιλοκομμένο μοσχάρι και μανιτάρια

ingredients.item: Of a fat content, by weight, not exceeding 5 %
Of a fat content, by weight, not exceeding 5 %

instructions: In a flat pot or deep pan, sauté the beef in the olive oil without turning it continuously, for 6–7 minutes, until it is cooked well.
Add the chopped onion and sauce for 3 minutes. Add the garlic and sauté for 2 minutes, until golden.
Add the wine and allow 1–2 minutes to Evaporate.
When the vessel dries, add the mushrooms in slices, grated tomato, thyme, salt and pepper.
Lower the heat, cover and simmer for 15 minutes.
In the end, add chopped parsley.
Meanwhile, boil the tallolins as instructed. With a clamp, add them to the sauce and let them boil hard for 1 minute.
Serve the tallolins on the dishes and sprinkle with grated cheese.

tangerine-cookie-recipe-lezzet.name: Tangerine Cookie Recipe

ingredients.item: 1 cup freshly cooked tangerine suy u
Sunflower oil or olive oil (a lighter flavor)
Stevia or erythritol (for low calorie version)
Lemon and orange mixture (forferah and light acidic taste)
You can create different flavors by spreading Kakao

instructions: 1. Take a deep rough of butter at room temperature.
2. Add liquid oil and powder sugar and mix until cream consistency.
3. Add the egg and add it to the homogeneity & repository;
4. Continue mixing by adding grape peel grater and tangerine water.
5. Vanilin ve kabartma tozunu ekleyin.
6. A soft dough kneading, which does not stick to the flour by adding azar azar.
7. From the doughnut size in the parish can be rolled and rolled together and the oily paper is intermittent to the oven tray.
8. From 180°C to 12–15 minutes, until lightly fried.
9. From the oven crack by spreading powder sugar from the oven and cold cookies
10.  Afiyet olsun.

tart-with-bolognese-sauce-lezzet.name: Tart With Bolognese Sauce
instructions: 1. The necessary materials for dough knead in a deep container.
2. Cover over with stretch film and wait for 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
3. Reject onions and yellowms.
4. Take butter to sauce pot or pan.
5. Roast the onion to pinkish by adding some salt.
6. Add the bark you reindeed on it.
7. Lightly add tomato porridge and paste.
8.  Kavurmaya devam edin.
9. Add curling and winding.
10. Cook 5-6 minutes by mixing continuously.
11. 11. Add and mix salt, pepper and parsley and leave to cool from the stove.
12. Open the size of the dough weighing mold.
12. August Broadcast the edges of the caliba you lubricate to stay high.
14 July Add and publish the material and half-water cup grated cheese.
15. Bake up to 170 degree bake in the oven you previously heated.
16. Add the remaining cheese to remove from the oven and cook for 3-4 minutes.
17. September Serve your service.

tenderloin-with-mushrooms-lezzet.name: Tenderloin With Mushrooms
instructions: 1. For marine process, repel onions and yellowms to a glass bowl.
2. Add and mix olive oil, milk, thyme.
3. Add meats to this mixture and wait for 3-4 hours.
4. Cut the bread of Hamburger to the most and fry in the oven grill.
5. Eat mushrooms in small grass and lemon juice.
6. In the form of a cube, roast the chopped olive oil until pink.
7. Add mushrooms and cook until softened in jealous fire by closing the cover of the pot.
8. Taste salt and pepper and add cream.
9. Cook until the Bonfiles are softened in a nonstick pan with a sauce.
10. Share the creamy mushroom on fried breads.
11. 11. Place the Bonfiles on tops.
12. Serve hot with apple slice potatoes cooked with fresh pepper leaves.

tequila-beer-and-citrus-cocktail.name: Tequila, Beer, And Citrus Cocktail
instructions: Combine grapefruit juice, lime juice, agave, and jelly in a cocktail shaker filled with ice and shake until incorporated, 15–20 seconds. Add tequila and shake 10 seconds longer. Fill a tall glass to the top with ice. Pour in beer just to fill the glass halfway. Double-strain grapefruit mixture into glass; garnish with lime wedge.

thai-chile-herb-dipping-sauce.name: Thai Chile-herb Dipping Sauce
instructions: 1. Place the rice in a small skillet over medium heat and cook, shaking the pan, until fragrant and lightly toasted, less than 1 minute. Transfer rice to a spice or coffee grinder and let cool. Process cooled rice until almost powdered, transfer to a small bowl, and reserve.

2. Place the chiles in the same skillet and cook over medium heat until lightly toasted, 30 to 45 seconds, shaking the skillet to avoid burning. Transfer the chiles to a spice or coffee grinder and let cool. Pulse the grinder until the chiles are coarsely chopped. Transfer the chilies to the bowl with the rice (the rice and the chiles can also be ground separately with a mortar and pestle).

3. Add the scallion, mint, cilantro, sugar, fish sauce, and lime juice to the bowl, stirring to dissolve the sugar. Cover and reserve (the sauce can be made a few hours ahead and kept at room temperature). May be stored in a tightly sealed container in the refrigerator for up to 1 week; however, the bright colors will fade.

thai-style-grilled-pork-tenderloin.name: Thai-style Grilled Pork Tenderloin

ingredients.prep: trimmed of all visible fat and cut into 3x1/4-inch long strips

instructions: For the sauce: Whisk granulated sugar, vinegar, lime juice, fish sauce, garlic, and red pepper flakes together in a bowl; set aside for serving.

For the pork: Combine buttery spread, fish sauce, soy sauce, brown sugar, garlic, and pepper in a bowl. Combine marinade and pork in a large resealable plastic bag. Seal the bag tightly, toss to coat pork, and marinate in the refrigerator for up to 1 hour.
Weave 2 pieces of pork onto each skewer.

For a charcoal grill: Open the bottom grill vents completely. Light a large chimney starter filled with charcoal briquettes (100 briquettes; 6 quarts). When the coals are hot, pour them in an even layer over the grill. Set the cooking grate in place, cover, and heat the grill until hot, about 5 minutes.
For a gas grill: Turn all the burners to high, cover, and heat the grill until hot, about 15 minutes. Oil the cooking grate and adjust the burners as needed to maintain high heat.
Place the skewers on the preheated grill; cook until pork is cooked through and lightly charred around the edges, 7 to 10 minutes, flipping the skewers halfway through.
Transfer the skewers to a platter and let rest for 5 minutes. Remove pork from the skewers, sprinkle the cilantro leaves over the top, and serve, passing the sauce separately.

the-original-margarita.name: The Original Margarita
instructions: Combine Cointreau, tequila, and lime juice in a shaker and add ice.
Shake and strain into a salt-rimmed rocks glass.
Garnish with a lime wheel.
Enjoy!

the-softest-scramble.name: The Softest Scramble
instructions: Combine eggs and 1 1/2 Tbsp. butter in a small room-temperature saucepan and season lightly with cayenne and salt. Place over medium-low heat and cook, whisking gently and constantly while scraping bottom and sides of pan, until eggs are just thickened, creamy, and small curds begin to form, 3–4 minutes total. (If mixture begins to stick to pan while cooking, remove from heat; whisk gently for 30 seconds, then continue cooking over heat.) Remove from heat.
Add 1/2 Tbsp. butter; whisk until melted. Season with salt; divide among small bowls. Top with whipped cream and caviar, if desired.

the-summer-fruit-soup.name: The Summer Fruit Soup
instructions: Combine the blueberries, pineapple, oranges, melon, lemon juice, lemon zest, sugar, and pineapple juice in a large skillet. If desired, stir in the yogurt to make the mixture more creamy. Cook and stir over medium-high heat until the sugar dissolves and the fruit softens, 3 to 5 minutes.

Place fruit mixture into a blender or the bowl of a food processor; blend or pulse until smooth. Spoon into a freezer dish. Chill until mixture becomes slushy, about 20 to 25 minutes, or until desired consistency. Serve garnished with fresh mint leaves.

this-spicy-bourbon-drink.name: This Spicy Bourbon Drink

ingredients.prep: plus Meyer lemon twist for serving

ingredients.item: A few dashes orange or angostura bitters

instructions: Combine bourbon, liqueur, Meyer lemon juice, and honey in a cocktail shaker; fill shaker with ice. Shake until outside of shaker is frosty, about 30 seconds. Strain into a chilled coupe glass, top with bitters, and garnish with lemon twist.

three-apricot-pavlova-lezzet.name: Three Apricot Pavlova
instructions: 1. Take a deep rough to whip eggs whites.
2. Add sugar to egg white at 3 times, each time, with 200 g.
3. Continue to snap up until you get a rigid foam.
4. After adding lemon juice, vanilla and starch, mix very short-term whipping.
5. Put the mixture of your hand in 3 large ball shape, which will be distanceed to an oven tray coated with oil paper.
6. Take care of being high, not the turpentine bow.
7.    Cook for 90 minutes in the oven heated at 120 degrees before and leave in the oven for 30-40 minutes after the prytic.
8. Cook the cold cream and sodayi with the help of a mixer for 4-5 minutes by taking a chilled rough in the refrigerator with vanilla and waiting again in the refrigerator until use.
9. Andnbsp; gently hit the top of the crazes you expect in the body with the spoon tip and fill them with chopped apricots and grapes, taking care of breaking the beze very carefully.
10. Fill the cream that you wait in the refrigerator on the bites you filled with spoon.
11. 11. Finally, serve without waiting too much by decorating the inner cores of the apricot, small grapes, fresh mint, almonds and the apricot that you extract.
12.  Afiyet olsun.
12. August What Are The Tricks Of Chimney Recipe?The eggs whites you will use should necessarily be at room temperature.
14 July To understand the consistency, make sure your finger is worth the mixture and does not get sugar.
15. Take the egg white and yellow carefully.
16. After cooking the Pavlova, wait to cool the oven by calling the cover.

three-cheese-salami-frittata.name: Three Cheese Salami Frittata

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Preheat oven to 218°C (220 degrees C).
Whisk eggs and milk together in a large bowl.

Heat olive oil in a large oven-proof skillet over medium-high heat. Pour 1/2 the egg mixture into the hot oil; arrange salami over egg mixture and sprinkle with parsley. Add 2/3 the Parmesan cheese, 2/3 Romano cheese, and 2/3 the mozzarella cheese over the salami-parsley layer; season with salt, pepper, and red pepper flakes.

Cook egg-cheese mixture until edges of frittata are browned and middle is set, 10 to 15 minutes. Pour the remaining egg mixture over frittata; sprinkle with remaining Parmesan cheese, Romano cheese, and mozzarella cheese; season with salt, pepper, and red pepper flakes.

Bake in the preheated oven until frittata has risen to about 3 inches and middle is set, 20 to 25 minutes. Carefully turn frittata onto a cutting board; cut into 2-inch squares using a sharp knife. Arrange squares in a bowl and refrigerate until chilled, about 1 hour.

toasted-bread-with-burrata-and-arugula.name: Toasted Bread With Burrata And Arugula

ingredients.item: X2-inch pieces friselle or crusty ciabatta bread

instructions: Preheat oven to 204°C. Fill small bowl with water. Place bread halves, cut side up, on baking sheet; brush bread with 2 tablespoons olive oil. Toast bread in oven until crisp and light golden around edges, about 15 minutes. Remove from oven. Lightly brush each bread half with water (do not soak). Rub cut sides of bread halves with cut sides of garlic halves.

Place 2 bread halves, cut side up, on each of 6 plates. Drizzle each bread half lightly with olive oil. Top each half with 1 burrata wedge; sprinkle with salt and freshly ground black pepper and drizzle lightly with olive oil. Toss arugula with 1 tablespoon olive oil in small bowl; sprinkle with salt and freshly ground black pepper. Mound arugula salad atop burrata on each bread half; sprinkle each with grated lemon peel and serve.

Pour an Italian Chardonnay, such as the 2008 Tormaresca Chardonnay from Puglia, with tropical fruity notes (Italy, $12). If you can't find that bottle, try the biodynamic 2008 Alois Lageder 'Beta Delta' Chardonnay-Pinot Grigio (Italy, $22). Its blend of aromatic fruit and bright acidity would be delicious with the bread with burrata.

toasted-nut-tart.name: Toasted Nut Tart

ingredients.item: All-purpose flour plus more for surface

instructions: Whisk 1 cup flour, cornstarch, salt, and baking powder in a medium bowl. Using an electric mixer, beat butter, sugar, and powdered sugar in another medium bowl until pale yellow and well blended, about 3 minutes. Add egg; beat to blend, occasionally scrapping bowl. Add dry ingredients in 3 batches, beating just to blend between additions. Gather dough into a ball; flatten into a disk. Wrap in plastic and chill for at least 1 hour. DO AHEAD: Can be made 2 days ahead. Keep chilled.

Preheat oven to 375°. Roll out dough on a lightly floured surface to a 12" round. Transfer to pan. Press onto bottom and up sides of pan. Trim dough flush with top of pan (reserve any scraps in case needed for patching crust after baking). Prick dough all over with a fork and freeze for 10 minutes.

Line chilled tart shell with foil or parchment paper, leaving a 1" overhang. Fill with pie weights or dried beans. Bake until edges of crust are just beginning to turn golden brown, 35–40 minutes. Remove foil and pie weights. Patch any cracks in crust with reserved dough. Return to oven; continue baking until golden all over, 15–20 minutes. Transfer to a wire rack; let cool completely. DO AHEAD: Can be made 1 day ahead. Store airtight in pan at room temperature.

Preheat oven to 350°. Place tart pan on a rimmed baking sheet; set aside. Spread out pistachios, hazelnuts, and pine nuts on 3 separate small rimmed baking sheets. Toast nuts until fragrant and light brown, about 5 minutes for pistachios, 10 minutes for pine nuts, and 20 minutes for hazelnuts. Let nuts cool completely.
Melt butter in a small saucepan over medium-high heat. Cook, stirring occasionally, until golden-brown bits form on bottom of pan, about 5 minutes. Remove from heat and set aside.
Stir brown sugar, corn syrup, salt, and vanilla in a medium bowl. Stir in eggs, then whisk in browned butter. Fold in nuts. Pour filling into tart shell.

Bake tart, rotating pan halfway through, until filling is set around edges and jiggles slightly in center when nudged, about 1 hour. Loosely tent foil over tart if crust gets too dark. Transfer to a wire rack to cool. DO AHEAD: Can be made 1 day ahead. Let stand at room temperature. Dust with powdered sugar just before serving. Serve with pistachio or hazelnut gelato, if desired.

toaster-oven-bread.name: Toaster Oven Bread
instructions: Butter a 6-by-3-inch round pan and set aside.

Combine the butter, yeast, sugar, salt and 1 cup warm water in a stand mixer fitted with the dough hook attachment. With the mixer on low speed, add 1/2 cup of the flour at a time, waiting for each addition to be fully incorporated before adding more. Once all of the flour is added, knead on medium speed for 8 minutes.
Transfer the dough to the prepared pan, cover and let rise until doubled in size, about 1 hour.
Preheat a toaster oven to 204°C.

Bake, rotating halfway through, until the bread is golden and the internal temperature registers 93°C, about 25 minutes. Let cool in the pan for 5 minutes, then turn out onto a rack and let cool completely.

tomato-mozzarella-garlic-bread-dippers.name: Tomato Mozzarella Garlic Bread Dippers
instructions: Soften the butter and mix it with the minced garlic.
Cut the loaf of bread in half lengthwise. Spread the garlic butter on the bread.
Top with mozzarella, and bake at 204°C (205°C) for 15 minutes.  Top with tomatoes and basil, sprinkle on salt and pepper.
For the dipping sauce, mix equal parts of balsamic vinegar and olive oil, and sprinkle with Italian seasoning.
Slice into strips.
Enjoy!

tomato-omelet-lezzet.name: Tomato Omelet

ingredients.item: Half water glass lor cheese Home
Half water glass lab cheese Home

instructions: 1. Peel and repel tomatoes and pass through wire strainer.
2. Crop eggs a rough.
3. Add grated grated meat, flew, salt and pepper, and lightly whip until you get a uniform mixture.
4. Add melody in the pan and egg mixture.
5. Give the pan evenly spread of omlet by swinging forward.
6. Turn the other side when one side is over.
7. Clean and chop Maydanoz and dereot.
8. Mix Lor cheese, milk cheese, parsley and dereot in a pit container.
9. Take the Omleti from the stove and pour the mixture with cheese on it.
10. Fold the omleti with wooden spatula.
11. 11. Cut to the service plate and eliminate the transverse.
12. Serve.

tomato-salad-with-creme-fraiche-and-oliv.name: Tomato Salad With Crème Fraîche And Olive Granola
instructions: Preheat oven to 375°. Toss ½ cup salt-cured black olives, pitted, coarsely chopped, ¼ cup raw sunflower seeds, 2 Tbsp. sesame seeds, 1½ tsp. fennel seeds, and pinch of crushed red pepper flakes with 1 Tbsp. pure maple syrup, ½ tsp. soy sauce, and 2 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil on a rimmed baking sheet. Arrange in an even layer and bake until golden brown, 14–16 minutes. Let granola cool.
Arrange 2 lb. heirloom tomatoes, sliced into ½"-thick rounds, on a large plate or baking sheet; drizzle with oil and season with kosher salt. Gently turn to coat well.

Stir one 8-oz. container crème fraîche and 2 tsp. fresh lemon juice in a small bowl to combine; season with kosher salt. Spread crème fraîche mixture across a platter, then top with seasoned tomatoes, leaving any juices on plate behind. Scatter granola and dill sprigs over and sprinkle with flaky sea salt.

torta-pasqualina.name: Torta Pasqualina

ingredients.prep: cut into pieces, chilled in freezer

ingredients.item: A 10"-diameter tart pan with a removable bottom

instructions: Pulse flour, sugar, and salt in a food processor to combine. Add butter and process until largest pieces of butter are pea-size. Drizzle in ½ cup ice water and pulse until a few shaggy pieces of dough form.

Transfer dough (get all the dry bits) to a work surface. Drizzle 1 Tbsp. ice water over; knead to just barely bring dough together. Divide in half. Place a half on a piece of plastic wrap. Using plastic and your hands, form dough into a ¾"-thick disk and tightly wrap. Repeat with remaining dough. Chill at least 2 hours.
Do Ahead: Dough can be made 5 days ahead. Keep chilled, or freeze up to 1 month.

Working in batches, cook Swiss chard in a large pot of boiling water until bright green and slightly softened, about 2 minutes. Using tongs, transfer to an ice bath to stop the cooking. Swish to cool, then remove greens and squeeze out as much excess liquid as possible. Transfer greens to a cutting board and finely chop (you should have about 4 cups).
Heat oil in a large saucepan over medium. Cook onions, stirring occasionally, until very soft and golden but not browned, 8–10 minutes. Remove from heat and mix in greens. Let cool.

Using a fork, whisk 4 eggs in a large bowl to blend. Add ricotta, Parmesan, and Swiss chard mixture and mix to combine. Add garlic, lemon zest, nutmeg, 2 tsp. salt, and 1½ tsp. pepper. Taste and adjust seasoning, if needed.

Let dough sit at room temperature 5 minutes to soften. Roll out 1 disk of dough on a lightly floured surface to a 12" round about ⅛" thick. Transfer to a parchment-lined rimmed baking sheet. Roll out remaining disk of dough and carefully transfer to tart pan. Lift up edges and allow dough to slump down into pan. Press dough firmly into sides and bottom of pan. Trim, leaving about a ½" overhang. Beat 1 egg in a small bowl to blend and brush edges of dough.
Scrape filling into pan, creating a mound in the center. Using an offset spatula, evenly spread filling over bottom, smoothing surface.

Use a spoon to create 5 divots in filling and crack an egg into each. Season eggs with a bit of salt. Arrange remaining round of dough over filling. Trim edges of top round, leaving ½" overhang. Fold edge of bottom crust up and over top, then press edges together to seal.
Crimp and brush top of dough with remaining beaten egg; sprinkle with sugar. Transfer pie to a foil-lined rimmed baking sheet and chill in freezer 10 minutes.
Preheat oven to 375°. Bake pie until crust is deep golden brown, 65–75 minutes. Transfer pan to a wire rack and let pie cool in pan at least 30 minutes before serving.
Do Ahead: Pie can be baked 1 day ahead. Let cool; cover and chill.

tortilla-pizza.name: Tortilla Pizza

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Place tortilla on a baking sheet. Brush with olive oil; sprinkle garlic powder, salt, and pepper on top.
Bake in the preheated oven until golden, 3 to 5 minutes.
Remove from the oven and spread tomato sauce on top; arrange chicken breast, green bell pepper, and green onions over tomato sauce. Sprinkle with mozzarella cheese.
Bake in the preheated oven until cheese is melted, about 5 minutes. Sprinkle oregano over cheese. Slice pizza into wedges using a pizza cutter.
Enjoy.

traditional-mexican-chilorio-comedera.name: Traditional Mexican Chilorio

ingredients.item: 600 gr de carne de paleta de cerdo (en trozos)

instructions: We'll start by getting a big pot, in which we can cook meat without any space problems. That's where we'll put the meat, clear but without his disposal of the fat parts that I could eventually have. That will help to stay more hydrated.
To cook, we'll cover with a few cups of water and some salt to suit. If you wish, you can taste water with some oregano powder, a bay leaf and a peppermint (fresh, preferably).

We'll let the meat cook for 40 minutes. To this end, there are two schools. One, that cooks up the stuffed meat but keeps an close eye on her to make sure that she moves often and that there are no parts to cook outside the liquid, because this would resect her. The second school, cook the stuffed pork to be submerged all the time. That's up to the cook.
Take care of how long the pork takes to cook and do other jobs. Wash the chilies and remove their branch remains, seeds and veins.
It steals some water and when you remove it from the fire, use it to submerge the chilies. Just leave them there for 10 minutes, so they get soft.
Mientras tanto, pela los dientes de ajo.

After the time of mooring the chilies, scrape them and put them to a blender. Add garlic to them, half a teaspoon oregano powder coffee maker, half pony, a pint of salt, one of sugar and one of pepper.

He processes everything to get a salsa. If necessary, help with a little of the water you used to boil the chilies, so that the blender will tighten all the ingredients. Reserve this sauce for the moment.

When the meat's ready, heat up a big frying pan with some butter. Drain the pieces of meat and cook them quickly to get some light, onto the surface. We have to do this very quickly so that the pork doesn't get cold.
When you remove the meat from the frying pan, it proceeds with the help of a pair of forks.

Reforms the pot where you cook the pork earlier and removes any other fluids. If necessary, add a little more butter and then get back pork, washed with chili sauce prepared in the blender. Add 3 tablespoons of vinegar, mix everything and let them cook under low heat for 20 minutes. Don't cover up the pot.
After this cooking time, try the chilorium to check the date. If necessary, fix with more salt and pepper, or other spices, and then mix very well.

traditional-mexican-esquites-comedera.name: Traditional Mexican Esquites

ingredients.item: 2 cucharadas de manteca (de origen animal o vegetal)

instructions: We'll start with peeling and minting into small cubes.
En el caso del chile, lo lavaremos y le cortaremos la cabeza. Luego, lo abriremos para retirar la vena y las semillas, y picaremos la pulpa muy finamente.
Wash up and spread them into several parts.
To continue, we will heat up a large frying pan (with medium heat) with the butter, till its frying.
When the butter's hot, we'll add the onion pieces to the frying pan and cook them till they start to become transparent.
Then we will add the already clear corn grains, the serrane chili (optional), the pieces of ebazote, a pint of salt and the chicken stock.
Mezclaremos bien los ingredientes y taparemos la olla, para dejarlos cocinarse durante 8 minutos.
After this time, we will check the consistency of elote grain, to see if it's ready or if necessary, let it cook a little more. We'll also check that. If necessary, we'll fix with a little more salt.

To serve, use cups or cups and fill them with grains and broth, helping with a spoonful of soup. Can water the elotes with lemon juice, or give a piece of lemon to every dinner party, to do this personally.
Put some mayonnaise onto the ski. Filling with broken white cheese with piquin chili powder and optionally with a little more salt.

tray-stew-on-bread-teleculinaria.name: Tray Stew On Bread

ingredients.item: 250 g de carne de vaca para cozer
250 g de perna de porco sem osso
500 g de farinha 65 de trigo sem fermento

instructions: Prepare the bread dough: in a large bowl, place the flour and salt, drill a hole in the middle and pour the yeast into it, previously dissolved in 300 ml of warm water. Add the olive oil, knead well, cover the bowl with adherent film and let it leave leave in a warm place until it doubles in size.
Take a large and high pot to the fire, with water, salt, blonde and garlic with peel washed. When the water starts boiling, add all the meats and sausages, previously chopped with a fork.

Fix the cabbage, wash it and cut it into small pieces. Peel the carrot, turnip, potato and cut them into pieces as well. Add all the vegetables to the pot of meat, let it boil, then remove from the fire, drain everything and eliminate garlic and blond. Garnish an oven tray (about 21 cm x 27 cm) with butter and sprinkle it with flour.

On a flat surface, lightly sprinkled with flour, stretch the dough with a roll to make a large rectangle that covers the bottom and top of the board. Cover the tray with the dough and spread the kale, vegetables, meats (without bones and skins) and sausages to the circles.

Tape with the bread dough and close the opening, placing it inside the tray and pressing a little with your fingers. Do three diagonal blows to the top, with a knife, and bring it to the oven, preheated at 180°C, until it blushes well. Take it out of the heat, let it cool down a little bit and unform. Serve the stew in warm or cold bread, sliced.

tropical-pork-loin-with-mango-recipe-com.name: Tropical Pork Loin With Mango Recipe
tropical-pork-loin-with-mango-recipe-com.original_name: Receta de lomo de cerdo tropical con mango

ingredients.item: 2  mangos maduros (pelados y cortados en cubos)

instructions: Sazona el lomo de cerdo con sal, pimienta, comino y pimienta cayena.
In a large frying pan, heats olive oil with medium-high heat. Dore the pork's back from all sides till it's well sealed. Withdraw and reserve.
In the same frying pan, add onion, garlic and peppers. Fight till they're tender.
Add the orange juice, lemon juice and honey. It's a good mix.
Coloca el lomo de cerdo en una bandeja para horno. Verte el sofrito sobre el lomo y cubre con papel aluminio.
A purified oven with an oven at 180 and 3 and (177 and 3) for 45 to 60 minutes or until well-cooked.
At half cooking, add mango cubes onto the back and continue baking till ready.
Retira del horno y deja reposar durante 10 minutos antes de cortar en rodajas.
Decorate with fresh cilantro and serve with peppers and mango as garrison.

truffle-brownies.name: Truffle Brownies
instructions: Position rack in center of oven and preheat to 177°C. Line 9x9x2-inch metal baking pan with foil, leaving overhang. Spray foil with nonstick vegetable oil spray. Combine 6 ounces bittersweet chocolate and butter in medium metal bowl. Set bowl over saucepan of simmering water and stir until chocolate and butter are melted and smooth. Remove bowl from over water and cool chocolate mixture until lukewarm, 5 to 10 minutes.

Whisk sugar, eggs, vanilla extract, and salt in large bowl to blend. Whisk in chocolate mixture. Stir in flour, then chopped toasted walnuts. Transfer batter to prepared baking pan. Bake brownies until tester inserted into center comes out with moist crumbs attached, 26 to 28 minutes. Transfer pan to cooling rack and let brownies cool completely.

Bring cream to simmer in small saucepan over medium heat. Remove from heat. Add remaining 6 ounces chocolate to hot cream and let stand 5 minutes to soften, then whisk until melted and smooth. Pour chocolate ganache over brownie sheet in pan and spread to cover completely. Let stand at cool room temperature until topping is set, about 4 hours. DO AHEAD Can be made 1 day ahead. Cover and store at room temperature.

Using foil as aid, lift brownie sheet from pan. Fold down foil edges. Using large sharp knife, cut brownie sheet into 25 squares, wiping knife with hot moist cloth after each cut. Arrange brownies on platter and serve.

turkey-bacon-and-egg-toast.name: Turkey Bacon And Egg Toast
instructions: Top toast with turkey bacon, eggs, and sprinkle with cheese.
Enjoy!

turkey-jook.name: Turkey Jook

ingredients.item: Roast turkey or rotisserie chicken carcass
Chung choi (salted preserved turnip) or 1 ball
. plus 1 tsp. diamond crystal or 2 0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt

ingredients.prep: julienned peeled ginger, thinly sliced scallions, store-bought fried onions, and/or sriracha (for serving; optional)

instructions:
Bring 1 roast turkey or rotisserie chicken carcass, meat removed, 2 large carrots, peeled, coarsely chopped, 2 celery stalks, coarsely chopped, 1 small onion, unpeeled, quartered through root end, 3 dried shiitake mushrooms, one 2" piece ginger, peeled, sliced ¼" thick, 3 pieces chung choi (salted preserved turnip) or 1 ball, coarsely chopped (if using), and 4½ qts. water to a boil in a large stockpot or Dutch oven. Reduce heat to low, cover pot, and gently simmer, stirring and skimming foam from surface occasionally, until light golden, flavorful, and faintly fragrant, about 2 hours. Carefully strain stock through a fine-mesh sieve into another stockpot or a large bowl; discard solids. You should have 1 gal. stock. If you are short, add water to get you there.
Do Ahead: Stock can be made 1 day ahead. Let cool, then transfer to airtight containers. Cover and chill.

Bring stock, 1⅓ cups calrose or other medium-grain rice, rinsed, ¼ cup unsalted roasted peanuts, 1 Tbsp. plus 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or 2¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt, and 2 cups shredded or 1" pieces cooked turkey to a boil in a clean large stockpot or Dutch oven. Reduce heat to medium-high and cook until rice is just starting to fall apart, 12–17 minutes. Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer, stirring often to prevent it from burning, until rice is falling apart and mixture is creamy and thick enough that any toppings won’t sink, 1–1½ hours. Taste jook and season with more salt if needed.

Ladle jook among bowls and top with remaining 1 cup shredded or 1" pieces cooked turkey, then cilantro leaves with tender stems, julienned peeled ginger, thinly sliced scallions, store-bought fried onions, and/or sriracha if desired.

turkey-quinoa-meatloaf.name: Turkey Quinoa Meatloaf

ingredients.item: Sea salt and black pepper to taste

instructions: Preheat oven to 375°.
Heat safflower oil in a large sauté pan; add onion and cook until translucent. Add carrot, celery, and peppers and cook until soft. Set aside and let cool.

In a large mixing bowl, combine turkey, quinoa, cooked vegetables, kale, and parsley. Season with salt and pepper. Mix well by hand until thoroughly combined. Shape mixture into two 9x4” loaves. Place on a parchment paper-lined baking sheet. Brush with barbecue sauce and bake for 45 minutes.
Let cool. Slice and serve.

turkey-recipe-stuffed-with-raisins-and-a.name: Turkey Recipe Stuffed With Raisins And Almonds
turkey-recipe-stuffed-with-raisins-and-a.original_name: Receta de pavo relleno con pasas y almendras
instructions: The turkey should be fresh and frosted for your production. Once ready, with the help of a sterilized injector, inject cognac to turkey strategically, focus on areas with more meat, such as breast.
In a small bowl, pour olive oil, salt, pepper, paptika and provenous herbs. Mix till a dough forms.
Unta al pavo con esta pasta por toda la superficie y por dentro. Reserva.
Preheat the oven at 180 ° C
Cut the onion into notebooks and steal the garlic teeth. Drop the butter and get them both cold till they're golden.
Add into a bowl ground bread, blonde and black raisins, steamed almond and garlic with onion.
Retira las semillas de la manzana y corta en cubos. Incorpora al bol y sazona con sal y pimienta al gusto. Mezcla todo muy bien.
Rellena el pavo hasta que bien compacto por dentro.
Vierte el vino blanco en una bandeja y coloca el pavo en el centro. Cubre con papel aluminio y hornea por aproximadamente 2 horas y media.
Cuando falten 20 minutos, retira el papel aluminio con cuidado para que el pavo dore y se rostice un poco.
Once ready, leave and be ready to enjoy.

turmeric-fried-eggs-breakfast-bowl.name: Turmeric Fried Eggs Breakfast Bowl

ingredients.prep: ribs and stems removed, leaves torn into large pieces

ingredients.item: Urfa pepper or other mild red pepper flakes and lime wedges

instructions: Place a rack in middle of oven and preheat to 375°. Bake bacon on a foil-lined rimmed baking sheet until brown and crisp, 12–15 minutes. Tear into large pieces; reserve fat for another use.

Meanwhile, spread out kale on a rimmed baking sheet and drizzle with 2 Tbsp. oil. Massage leaves with oil and season with salt. Bake, tossing halfway through, until lightly browned around edges and crisp-tender, 5–7 minutes.
Season yogurt with salt. Divide among plates and top with bacon and kale.

Heat remaining 3 Tbsp. oil in a large nonstick skillet over medium-high. Add eggs one at a time, shaking skillet between additions to keep them from sticking together. Cook, tilting skillet toward you and spooning oil over egg whites until whites are set, about 2 minutes. Remove skillet from heat, keeping skillet tilted, and add turmeric to oil. Baste egg whites with turmeric oil.
Divide eggs among plates and drizzle turmeric oil over. Sprinkle with red pepper flakes and squeeze limes over.
